channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: XRP sits at $1.36 as bears press and RSI stays neutral—watch $1.42 on the upside and $1.31 on the downside. Can a break above $1.4... https://Blockchain.News/news/20260327-price-prediction-xrp-testing-142-resistance-with-downside-risk #XRP #CryptoForecast #PricePrediction

item.title: BNB sits at a hinge: neutral RSI, key resistance ahead, a run to $665-$675 hangs on reclaiming $635. 🚦 #BNB #Crypto Reuters? No—stick to facts https://Blockchain.News/news/20260327-price-prediction-bnb-technical-breakdown-points-to-665-recovery #TechnicalAnalysis

item.title: ETH eyeing a 2,200–2,400 recovery in 4–6 weeks as MACD heats and RSI sits neutral at 46.23. Break key resistance to power the move. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260327-price-prediction-eth-targets-2200-2400-recovery-by-april #ETH #Crypto #Market
